title: TPC Regulatory & Standards Mapping
description: Maps 140 certified computational physics domains to applicable industry standards, regulatory frameworks, and verification requirements.

standards: ASME V&V 20-2009 (Standard for Verification and Validation in Computational Fluid Dynamics and Heat Transfer)
AIAA G-077-1998 (Guide for the Verification and Validation of CFD Simulations)
ISO 13528 (Statistical methods — Proficiency testing by interlaboratory comparison)
ISO 18434 (Condition monitoring and diagnostics of machines — Thermography)
IEEE 1597.1 (Standard for Validation of Computational Electromagnetics)
IEEE 1597.2 (Recommended Practice for Validation of Computational Electromagnetics)
MIL-STD-461G (Requirements for the Control of Electromagnetic Interference)
NIST Standard Reference Data (Thermophysical Properties of Fluid Systems)
ITER Physics Basis (Nuclear Fusion journal standards)
ASME V&V 10-2006 (Guide for Verification and Validation in Computational Solid Mechanics)
ISO 10303 (STEP — Standard for Exchange of Product Data)
NASA-STD-5020A (Requirements for Threaded Fastening Systems in Spaceflight Hardware)
ISO 11146 (Lasers and laser-related equipment — Test methods for laser beam widths)
ASTM E8 (Standard Test Methods for Tension Testing of Metallic Materials)
ISO 12135 (Metallic materials — Unified method of test for quasi-static fracture toughness)
NAFEMS Quality System for Engineering Simulation
NIST Standard Reference Data for Quantum Systems
FDA Guidance for Industry: Physiologically Based Pharmacokinetic Analyses
IEEE 1012 (System, Software, and Hardware Verification and Validation)
ISO/IEC 25010 (Systems and software quality requirements and evaluation)
SIAM Guidelines for Scientific Computing Reproducibility
NIST Computational Chemistry Comparison and Benchmark Database
Delta Gauge for DFT (Reproducibility of DFT Calculations)
AFLOW Standards for High-Throughput Materials Science
ICSD Inorganic Crystal Structure Database Standards
NRC Regulatory Guide 1.203 (Transient and Accident Analysis Methods)
ENDF/B Evaluated Nuclear Data File Standards
PDG Review of Particle Physics Standards
IEEE P7130 (Standard for Quantum Computing Definitions)
IAU Resolutions on Relativistic Reference Systems
IERS Conventions (International Earth Rotation and Reference Systems Service)
ISO 17025 (General requirements for the competence of testing and calibration laboratories)
ISO 10218 (Robots and robotic devices — Safety requirements)

verification_framework.name: Trustless Physics Compilation (TPC)
components: SHA-256 hash-chain audit trail per session

certification_criteria.adapter_instantiation: Adapter class loads and initialises without error
certification_criteria.solver_execution: evaluate/solve/propagate produces valid (result, conservation, session) triple
certification_criteria.conservation_verification: Conservation object contains ≥1 verified physical law with to_dict()
certification_criteria.trace_integrity: Session has ≥2 hash-chained entries with SHA-256 digests
certification_criteria.lean_proof_coverage: Domain category has a corresponding Lean 4 formal proof with ≥1 verified theorem
